title: Thlaspi eigii
intro: Thlaspi elegans is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, also known as the mustard or cress family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Thlaspi elegans include glucosinolates, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Thlaspi elegans is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and capsules, as well as being incorporated into supplements and tinctures.
